data.title: Advanced Encryption Techniques
data.description: Encryption of data at rest and in transit to secure user data and content.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: MFA adds an extra layer of security to user accounts by requiring multiple verification steps.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS and application-based authentication methods.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Real-time monitoring systems that detect and respond to potential threats and unauthorized access attempts.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AI and machine learning to identify anomalies.

data.title: Data Privacy Protocols
data.description: Strict protocols in place to ensure user data privacy and compliance with data protection regulations.
data.technical_spec: GDPR compliance for EMEA, CCPA for California regions.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages ethical hackers to find vulnerabilities by offering rewards for valid security findings.
data.technical_spec: Managed via third-party platforms like HackerOne.
